legal-requests.dropdown.label: Select request type
legal-requests.landing_page.title: Legal requests
legal-requests.landing_page.description: View and manage legal requests you've submitted to Cloudflare. Only requests created by you are shown.
legal-requests.two_factor_required: You cannot access this page until you have enabled two-factor authentication or single sign-on (SSO).
legal-requests.table.tooltip.submitted: Your request has been received and is being reviewed. A Cloudflare representative will contact you as processing begins.
legal-requests.table.tooltip.closed: This request has been closed. Contact Cloudflare if you have further questions.
legal-requests.table.empty_description: Submit a legal request to get started.
legal-requests.form.validation_errors: Please fix the errors above before submitting
legal-requests.form.prefill_notice: Some fields have been pre-filled from your account. Please review before submitting.
legal-requests.attachments.title: Attachments
legal-requests.attachments.description: Upload supporting documents such as court orders, subpoenas, or other legal process documents.
legal-requests.attachments.duplicate_err: A file with this name has already been added.
legal-requests.attachments.validation_fa: File validation failed. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
legal-requests.attachments.no_files_erro: Please attach at least one document before submitting.
legal-requests.attachments.upload_failed: Your request was created but the following files could not be uploaded. You can retry or remove failed files.
legal-requests.attachments.uploading_do_: Please do not close this page.
legal-requests.attachments.file_types_he: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, TXT, JSON, JPEG, PNG, GIF (max 100 MB each)
legal-requests.detail.heading: Request details
legal-requests.summary.heading: Summary
legal-requests.initial_attachments.descr: Documents you submitted with this request.
legal-requests.messaging.message_placeho: Write your message… (Note: Files that you upload will not be re-downloadable after you share them)
legal-requests.messaging.empty_descripti: Send your first message with the compose box below
legal-requests.messaging.send_disabled_n: There has to be at least a message to be able to send
legal-requests.messaging.attachments_fai: Message not sent — one or more attachments failed to upload. Please try again.
